title: castanola glabrifolia
intro: Castanola glabrifolia, also known as the silky castanola, is a plant species in the borage family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Castanola glabrifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Castanola glabrifolia typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
